title: hydrangea peruviana var. oerstedii
intro: Hydrangea peruviana var. oerstedii, also known as the Panamanian hydrangea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The roots of Hydrangea peruviana var. oerstedii contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness their medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
